hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”；【CRYPTO】随着下一个山寨币现货 ETF 竞争的加速，VanEck 和 Grayscale 提交了新的 BNB ETF 修正案；【FINANCE】斯蒂芬·米兰退出美联储。他如何为凯文·沃什奠定了基础。。

items.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.summary: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”
items.summary_zh: 随着通胀飙升和国债收益率飙升，沃什可能会面对没有心情放松政策的联邦公开市场委员会。

items.title: VanEck, Grayscale file fresh BNB ETF amendments as race for next altcoin spot ETF accelerates
items.summary: Canary Capital, meanwhile, continues to push forward on its first-of-its-kind staked TRX ETF, also filing an amendment on Friday.
items.title_zh: 随着下一个山寨币现货 ETF 竞争的加速，VanEck 和 Grayscale 提交了新的 BNB ETF 修正案
items.summary_zh: 与此同时，Canary Capital 继续推进其首个质押 TRX ETF，并于周五提交了修正案。

items.title: Stephen Miran exits the Fed. How he set the stage for Kevin Warsh.
items.summary: The outgoing Fed governor shares big ideas with the incoming chair.
items.title_zh: 斯蒂芬·米兰退出美联储。他如何为凯文·沃什奠定了基础。
items.summary_zh: 即将卸任的美联储理事与即将上任的主席分享了重要想法。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
items.summary: In an interview with CoinDesk, the lead engineer at Firedancer gives an update on how the new client, also known as a software, is fairing in the Solana ecosystem.
items.title_zh: Jump Crypto 的“Firedancer”正在采取缓慢而稳定的方式来推出期待已久的 Solana 基础设施
items.summary_zh: 在接受 CoinDesk 采访时，Firedancer 的首席工程师介绍了新客户端（也称为软件）如何在 Solana 生态系统中运行的最新信息。

items.title: The $293 million KelpDAO hack shows why DeFi is finally being forced to grow up
items.summary: For protocol founders and security researchers, the incident reinforced a broader shift underway across crypto: DeFi is no longer primarily battling coding bugs. It’s battling complexity.
items.title_zh: 价值 2.93 亿美元的 KelpDAO 黑客事件揭示了 DeFi 最终被迫成长的原因
items.summary_zh: 对于协议创始人和安全研究人员来说，这一事件强化了加密领域正在发生的更广泛的转变：DeFi 不再主要与编码错误作斗争。它正在与复杂性作斗争。

items.title: XRP beat bitcoin gains as Clarity Act advanced, but a real bullrun still needs Congress
items.summary: The token jumped 5% after a Senate committee moved the market-structure bill forward, reviving hopes that legal clarity can pull deeper institutional money into XRP products.
items.title_zh: 随着《澄清法案》的推进，XRP 击败了比特币涨幅，但真正的牛市仍需要国会
items.summary_zh: 在参议院委员会推进市场结构法案后，该代币上涨了 5%，重新燃起了人们对法律清晰度能够吸引更多机构资金投入 XRP 产品的希望。

items.title: Harvard dumps ether ETF as Abu Dhabi sovereign fund keeps adding to bitcoin positions
items.summary: Abu Dhabi-based Mubadala added over $90 million to its already sizeable position in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF.
items.title_zh: 随着阿布扎比主权基金不断增加比特币头寸，哈佛抛售以太坊 ETF
items.summary_zh: 总部位于阿布扎比的 Mubadala 在贝莱德 iShares 比特币信托 ETF 中本已相当大的头寸基础上又增加了超过 9000 万美元。

items.title: 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF posts ‘best day’ inflows of $5 million as Coinbase becomes treasury deployer
items.summary: The newly-launched ETF “had its best day yet" on Thursday with $8.1 million trading volume and net inflows of roughly $4.9 million.
items.title_zh: 随着 Coinbase 成为资金部署者，21Shares 的 Hyperliquid ETF 迎来了 500 万美元的“最佳日”流入
items.summary_zh: 周四，这只新推出的 ETF 迎来了“迄今为止最好的一天”，交易量为 810 万美元，净流入约为 490 万美元。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
items.summary: The search for HALO stocks is a hot theme in the stock market. There is now an ETF to invest in it.
items.title_zh: 市场最热门的股票主题之一是购买人工智能无法取代的一切
items.summary_zh: 寻找HALO股票是股市的热门话题。现在有一个ETF可以投资它。

items.title: 'Biggest bottleneck in the AI buildup' fuels DRAM ETF to record
items.summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) just reached $10 billion in assets at the fastest pace ever for an exchange-traded fund according to TMX VettaFi.
items.title_zh: “人工智能发展的最大瓶颈”推动 DRAM ETF 创纪录
items.summary_zh: 根据 TMX VettaFi 的数据，Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) 的资产刚刚以交易所交易基金有史以来最快的速度达到 100 亿美元。

items.title: NFL wants certain trading contracts banned from prediction markets like 'first play of game,' injuries
items.summary: The letter, which was reviewed by CNBC, calls for banning certain contracts and raising the age requirements for participation on sports-related contracts.
items.title_zh: NFL 希望禁止某些交易合同进入预测市场，例如“第一场比赛”、伤病等
items.summary_zh: CNBC 审阅了这封信，呼吁禁止某些合同并提高参与体育相关合同的年龄要求。

items.title: Hezbollah drone strike videos show evolving tactics against Israel
items.summary: BBC Verify has examined dozens of videos of fibre-optic drone attacks carried out by the Lebanese armed group.
items.title_zh: 真主党无人机袭击视频显示针对以色列不断变化的战术
items.summary_zh: BBC verify 审查了数十段黎巴嫩武装组织实施光纤无人机袭击的视频。

items.title: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
items.summary: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告后台湾坚称独立
items.summary_zh: 这位美国总统刚刚结束北京峰会，就警告台湾不要正式宣布独立。

items.title: Erdogan Wants Turkey to Have More Babies. Few Parents Are Listening.
items.summary: Using cash grants and subsidized loans, President Recep Tayyip Erdogan’s government is trying to increase the birthrate. It’s not working.
items.title_zh: 埃尔多安希望土耳其生更多婴儿。很少有父母在听。
items.summary_zh: 总统雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安 (Recep Tayyip Erdogan) 的政府正利用现金补助和补贴贷款来提高出生率。它不起作用。

items.title: Wave of Ukrainian Strikes Kills at Least 4, Russia Says
items.summary: More than 550 drones were intercepted or shot down in more than a dozen regions, including Moscow, in one of largest attacks of the war.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯称乌克兰一波袭击造成至少4人死亡
items.summary_zh: 包括莫斯科在内的十几个地区有超过 550 架无人机被拦截或击落，这是战争中最大规模的袭击之一。

items.title: The Clarity Act took a step forward: State of Crypto
items.summary: Unpacking Thursday's at-times contentious markup hearing.
items.title_zh: 《清晰法案》向前迈出了一步：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: 解析周四时常引起争议的加价听证会。

items.title: A Russian stablecoin built to dodge sanctions says it can survive even if they're lifted
items.summary: A7A5, the Russia-linked stablecoin built to move money around banking restrictions, says faster trade settlement, yield and regional crypto infrastructure could keep it relevant even if geopolitical tensions ease.
items.title_zh: 一种为躲避制裁而建立的俄罗斯稳定币表示，即使制裁解除，它也能生存
items.summary_zh: A7A5 是一种与俄罗斯相关的稳定币，旨在绕过银行限制转移资金，它表示，即使地缘政治紧张局势缓解，更快的贸易结算、收益率和区域加密基础设施也可以使其保持相关性。

items.title: Crypto users are choosing juicy yields over protection, putting billions at risk of hacks
items.summary: DeFi insurance protocols debuted with huge ambitions during the 2020 crypto boom. But as hacks evolved and users chased yields over protection, most of the sector collapsed under the same risks it was built to cover.
items.title_zh: 加密货币用户选择丰厚的收益而不是保护，使数十亿人面临黑客攻击的风险
items.summary_zh: DeFi 保险协议在 2020 年加密货币热潮期间首次亮相，雄心勃勃。但随着黑客的发展以及用户追逐收益而不是保护，该行业的大部分都在其旨在应对的相同风险下崩溃了。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.

items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.

items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.

items.title: DeFi's new front: VerifiedX bets bitcoin's next chapter is programmable, private
items.summary: VerifiedX says its Bitcoin sidechain enables programmable, privacy-preserving transactions without synthetic wrappers, targeting growing institutional demand for native DeFi on the original blockchain system.
items.title_zh: DeFi 的新战线：VerifiedX 押注比特币的下一章是可编程的、私有的
items.summary_zh: VerifiedX 表示，其比特币侧链无需合成包装即可实现可编程、保护隐私的交易，瞄准了机构对原始区块链系统上的原生 DeFi 日益增长的需求。

items.title: Crypto longs lose $500 million as bitcoin slides to $78,000, SOL and XRP down 5%
items.summary: A long-skewed liquidation cascade flushed leverage across the major tokens overnight, with the move tracking a global bond selloff and the worst session for U.S. stocks since March.
items.title_zh: 比特币跌至 78,000 美元，加密货币多头损失 5 亿美元，SOL 和 XRP 下跌 5%
items.summary_zh: 长期倾斜的清算级联在一夜之间冲垮了主要代币的杠杆率，此举追踪了全球债券抛售以及美国股市自 3 月份以来最糟糕的交易日。

items.title: Bhutan ‘doesn’t recall’ selling any bitcoin, disputing widely tracked $1 billion BTC drawdown
items.summary: Arkham Intelligence data shows that over $1 billion in bitcoin has left wallets attributed to Bhutan in the past year, flowing to exchanges and trading firms. The country says it has not sold any.
items.title_zh: 不丹“不记得”出售过任何比特币，对广泛追踪的 10 亿美元比特币提款提出异议
items.summary_zh: Arkham Intelligence 的数据显示，去年有超过 10 亿美元的比特币离开了不丹的钱包，流向了交易所和贸易公司。该国表示尚未出售任何产品。

items.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
items.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

items.summary_zh: 在该模型在 OfficeQA Pro 基准测试中树立了新的技术水平后，Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 用于企业代理工作流程。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.

items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.
items.title_zh: 为什么台湾成为特习会谈的决定性问题
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对台军售将列入他与中国国家主席习近平周五结束的会谈议程。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines
items.summary: The Omaha-based company built a position worth more than $2.6 billion, making Delta Berkshire's 14th-largest holding at the end of March.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司以 26 亿美元持有达美航空股份重返航空公司
items.summary_zh: 截至 3 月底，这家总部位于奥马哈的公司持有价值超过 26 亿美元的头寸，成为达美伯克希尔公司的第 14 大持仓。

items.title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
items.summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼（Bill Ackman）在第一季度抛售期间增持了微软股份，押注人工智能和云计算增长

items.title: Trump-Xi summit: The 3 big takeaways from historic meeting in Beijing
items.summary: The two-day meeting wrapped up Friday, setting the tone for further U.S.-China talks this year.
items.title_zh: 特习会：北京历史性会晤的三大收获
items.summary_zh: 为期两天的会议于周五结束，为今年进一步的美中会谈定下了基调。

items.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
items.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

items.summary_zh: 该机构补充说，此次疫情已有约246例病例和80人死亡，不符合大流行紧急情况的标准。

items.title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
items.summary: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国的埃博拉疫情有多令人担忧？
items.summary_zh: 刚果民主共和国的疫情已被宣布为卫生紧急状态，报告了近 250 例疑似病例。

items.title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
items.summary: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统表示，此次袭击是对俄罗斯对乌克兰城市发动致命袭击的“正当”回应。

items.title: UAE reports strike near Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
items.summary: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it calls a "dangerous escalation".
items.title_zh: 阿联酋报告阿布扎比核电站附近发生袭击
items.summary_zh: 该国正在调查此次罢工的根源，称其为“危险的升级”。

items.title: Man drives car into pedestrians in Italy, injuring eight
items.summary: Eight people were injured, four seriously, before passers-by gave chase and stopped the man.
items.title_zh: 意大利一男子驾车冲撞行人致八人受伤
items.summary_zh: 八人受伤，其中四人伤势严重，随后路人追赶并阻止了该男子。

items.title: Trump-backed challenger defeats Republican senator who voted to convict president
items.summary: Trump threw his full support behind Julia Letlow in Louisiana's high-stakes contest, branding the incumbent "disloyal".

items.title: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive
items.summary: The individual is one of four former passengers on the MV Hondius isolating on Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

items.summary_zh: 该人是在不列颠哥伦比亚省温哥华岛隔离的 MV Hondius 上的四名前乘客之一。

items.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
items.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

items.title: Runoff in Peru Offers Two Starkly Differing Visions for the Nation
items.summary: The presidential election pits Keiko Fujimori, a conservative, against Roberto Sánchez, a leftist, after a crisis marked by delays and protests.
items.title_zh: 秘鲁的径流为国家提供了两种截然不同的愿景
items.summary_zh: 在一场以延误和抗议为标志的危机之后，总统选举将由保守派藤森惠子与左翼人士罗伯托·桑切斯对决。

items.title: How Birding Apps Are Boosting Tourism in the World’s Top Bird Destination
items.summary: Colombia is home to the most species of birds known to ornithologists. Merlin, an app, is helping to build an “avian tourism” industry there.

items.title: In Iraqi Desert, Two Israeli Outposts Were Kept Secret for Months
items.summary: Israel spent over a year preparing a covert site in Iraq for its operations against Iran, regional officials say. Iraqi officials later confirmed the existence of a second base.
items.title_zh: 在伊拉克沙漠，两个以色列前哨基地被保密数月
items.summary_zh: 地区官员称，以色列花了一年多的时间在伊拉克准备一个秘密地点，用于针对伊朗的行动。伊拉克官员后来证实了第二个基地的存在。

items.title: W.H.O. Declares Ebola Outbreak a Global Health Emergency
items.summary: Just a day after the announcement, cases were confirmed in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda. There is no approved vaccine for this species of Ebola.
items.title_zh: WHO。宣布埃博拉疫情为全球卫生紧急事件
items.summary_zh: 就在宣布这一消息的第二天，刚果民主共和国和乌干达就确诊了病例。目前还没有针对这种埃博拉病毒的批准疫苗。

items.title: A North Korean Soccer Team Makes a Rare Visit to South Korea
items.summary: The team’s trip, for a women’s soccer tournament, is unlikely to catalyze a diplomatic thaw between the two Koreas, although some sports events have.

items.summary_zh: 该队参加女子足球锦标赛的行程不太可能促进朝韩两国之间的外交解冻，尽管一些体育赛事确实起到了促进作用。

items.title: Venezuela Extradites Billionaire Tycoon Alex Saab to U.S.
items.summary: The extradition of Alex Saab, who is tied to a huge graft scheme, is part of a purge of powerful figures who helped the deposed president, Nicolás Maduro, stay in power.

items.summary_zh: 亚历克斯·萨博(Alex Saab)与一项巨大的贪污计划有关，他的引渡是清洗帮助被废黜总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗(Nicolás Maduro)继续掌权的有权势人物的一部分。

items.title: How a Nature Cruise Turned Into a Nightmare

items.title: Fears Grow That Iran May Be Using Proxy Groups Beyond Mideast

items.summary_zh: 美国对穆罕默德·萨阿迪的指控引发了人们的担忧，即伊朗可能与其代理人合作，在该地区之外发动袭击。

items.summary: The push comes after Japan's cabinet approved a bill last month that would reclassify crypto under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act.

items.title: House Agriculture leaders press Trump to appoint CFTC commissioners as CLARITY Act advances in Senate
items.summary: Chair Michael Selig has been the agency's sole commissioner since December, with four seats sitting empty, as Trump has not nominated replacements.
items.title_zh: 随着《澄清法案》在参议院取得进展，众议院农业领导人敦促特朗普任命 CFTC 委员
items.summary_zh: 自去年 12 月以来，主席迈克尔·塞利格 (Michael Selig) 一直是该机构的唯一专员，由于特朗普尚未提名继任者，因此有四个席位空着。

items.title: Crypto market structure bill still faces significant hurdles despite Senate committee win: analysts
